title: trond recipe run output
description: Returned by `trond recipe run <name> -o json`. Stable shape so an MCP recipe.run tool can pass it through verbatim.

recipe.description: The .name of the recipe that was run.

status.description: Aggregate verdict. failed=a step's on_failure=abort triggered; rolled_back=on_failure=rollback triggered and the rollback section ran.

failed_at.description: Step ID that triggered failure; absent on success.

rollback_steps.description: Records for each rollback step that ran (only set when rollback_ran=true).

skipped.description: True when --resume-from passed this step or its skip predicate evaluated true.

output.description: JSON object captured from the step's stdout (when the step's command supports -o json).

error.description: Set when the step's command exited non-zero.
